notable_quotes: Oh, here's fun by the way... I just left camp and came back to where we started and that goblin's dead. Someone killed it in the like 30 seconds we were away at camp.
Three torches and the light of Lathander shining around for six meters of holy radiant light... that's got to be good enough.
Shadowheart has immediately proved her value. She's figured out something about these shadows.
So yeah, I'll let you to walk out of the light to see what happens. Oh, turn-based mode? That's interesting.
Luckily your diary is just hanging out right next to you. So okay, that's bloody convenient.
priority_actions: Optimize camera transition code to eliminate frame stutters and snaps at cinematic trigger points (12:03, 18:01).
Add more specific 'the corpse remains silent' UI feedback or flavor text for 'Speak with Dead' on narrative corpses that do not have recorded dialogue (8:39).
Resolve character model and weapon clipping during group dialogue scenes in the cultist camp (13:15).
Implement a visual indicator or dialogue line from a companion earlier in the zone to signal that standard torches will not provide sufficient protection deeper in the forest (19:50).
top_highlight: Okay, I do have a lyre that used to belong to a drow, that's true. I've got the spider lyre we got off Minthara. Minthara was a True Soul, she had the same lyre. That's how you get through. It's somet
